meaning: 金伯利[南非(阿扎尼亚)中部城市]
examples: We were still there at dusk, when we pulled in to Kimberley.
The Kimberley is also home to the massive boab tree, close relative of the African baobabs.
The judges also had high praise for pop star Kimberley Walsh, whom they dubbed "Nimble Kimble".
From Alex, Year 8 on behalf of The BBC School Report Team at The Kimberley School.
